title: The Low Budget Time Machine
overview: A conniving professor and his gorilla side-kick convince down-and-out astronauts to go on a time-journey to benefit mankind.  Once transported to the future, they meet beautiful but deadly space babes, a horrible monster and an army of mutants.  The last doomed survivors of earth are trapped by a cosmic plague unleashed in an apocalyptic future!
